customManagers.description: Update ARGs annotated with '# renovate: datasource=… depName=…'. Needed because the base images compose multiple ARGs in FROM (e.g. ${REGISTRY_DOCKERHUB}/library/rust:${RUST_VERSION}-slim-bookworm), which the dockerfile manager cannot auto-replace.

packageRules.description: These Dockerfiles compose their FROM refs from multiple ARGs; the dockerfile manager resolves the ARGs at extraction but then cannot find the resolved string in the raw file ('Cannot find replaceString' → the whole branch silently produces no commit). The annotated-ARG custom manager above owns these deps instead.
Annotated ARGs hold bare versions that are reused outside the FROM line (rustup default, tag suffix composition); appending @sha256 digests would corrupt them.
